title.rendered: [Free Webinar] An Introduction to Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Nonprofits

content.rendered:
Date: Tuesday, April 23, 2024
Time: 1 pm ET / 10 am PT (1 hour)
Cost: Free
Presented by: Robert Friend, Sr. Enterprise Solutions Executive at Eventgroove and nonprofit industry professional

If you could significantly increase staff productivity and improve community engagement and impact, what kind of impact would that have on your cause?

Geared toward nonprofits, this one-hour webinar provides demonstrations on how to use Al-driven tools to enhance donor engagement, optimize campaign targeting, and personalize communication strategies.

Whether you’re already using the tech or have reservations, this free one-hour webinar offers practical insights and tangible takeaways for implementation. Topics include:

  • Live ChatGPT prompts and demonstrations
  • How to incorporate AI into your nonprofit’s work
  • Discussion about any issues you may have with AI
  • An exploration of what lies ahead in AI and nonprofits

 Register Now!

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, please register and you will be sent a link to the recording 24-48 hours after the webinar is over. Also, visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information about how to join and attend this webinar.
